title: Open the app and navigate to the photo editing screen
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the photo editing screen
expected_result: The photo editing screen is displayed

title: Click on the download icon
preconditions: The photo editing screen is displayed

title: Click on the upload icon
preconditions: The photo editing screen is displayed

title: Click on the share icon
preconditions: The photo editing screen is displayed

title: Click on the text tool
preconditions: The photo editing screen is displayed
expected_result: The text tool should be active

title: Click on the paint tool
preconditions: The photo editing screen is displayed
expected_result: The paint tool should be active

title: Click on the transform tool
preconditions: The photo editing screen is displayed
expected_result: The transform tool should be active

title: Click on the back arrow in the header
preconditions: The photo editing screen is displayed
test_steps: Click on the back arrow in the header
expected_result: The user should be navigated back to the previous screen

title: Input text using the text tool
preconditions: The photo editing screen is displayed and the text tool is active
test_steps: Click on the text tool | Click on the image to place the text | Input the text 'Happy Birthday!'
expected_result: The text 'Happy Birthday!' should be displayed on the image

title: Select a color using the paint tool
preconditions: The photo editing screen is displayed and the paint tool is active
test_steps: Click on the paint tool | Select the color 'Red'
expected_result: The selected color should be applied to the image

title: Rotate the image using the transform tool
preconditions: The photo editing screen is displayed and the transform tool is active
test_steps: Click on the transform tool | Rotate the image 90 degrees
expected_result: The image should be rotated 90 degrees
